# nom-indexer-go

> Documentation for the nom-indexer-go Zenon Network indexer.

Hash-formatted flat index of every documentation page, generated from mkdocs.yml. See https://llmstxt.org for the convention.

- [Home](docs/index.md): A Go service that indexes the Zenon Network blockchain (NoM) into PostgreSQL.
## Architecture

- [Overview](docs/architecture/overview.md): The big picture: one indexer process, read-only REST API and MCP
- [Data flow](docs/architecture/data-flow.md): A line-by-line trace of what happens between "the node tells us a new
- [Sync and recovery](docs/architecture/sync-and-recovery.md): How the indexer catches up from a cold start, transitions to real-time
- [Cron and snapshots](docs/architecture/cron-and-snapshots.md): The cron goroutine in
- [Bridge sync](docs/architecture/bridge-sync.md): The bridge sync goroutine refreshes three categories of data on a
## Schema

- [Overview](docs/schema/index.md): This is the canonical contract between the indexer and its consumers. Every
- [Conventions](docs/schema/conventions.md): These rules apply across every table in this schema. Where a per-table page
- [ERD](docs/schema/erd.md): Relations are by convention only — the schema declares **no** foreign-key
- [Generated reference](docs/schema/_generated.md): This page is a placeholder for the optional `tbls`-generated schema
### Core

- [momentums](docs/schema/momentums.md): One row per block header. The schema's primary ledger anchor — every other
- [accounts](docs/schema/accounts.md): One row per address that has ever been observed in a block. Tracks the
- [balances](docs/schema/balances.md): Current token balance for an (address, token_standard) pair, plus the
- [account_blocks](docs/schema/account_blocks.md): Every transaction the indexer has seen, with decoded ABI method + inputs
- [tokens](docs/schema/tokens.md): ZTS token registry — one row per token standard, with current supply,
- [token_mints](docs/schema/token_mints.md): One row per `Token.Mint` event. The issuer (the embedded reward contract
- [token_burns](docs/schema/token_burns.md): One row per `Token.Burn` event. The burner, the amount, and the token are
### Pillars and delegation

- [pillars](docs/schema/pillars.md): Current state of every pillar (validator) the network has ever registered.
- [pillar_updates](docs/schema/pillar_updates.md): Append-only log of pillar configuration changes. Each `Register`,
- [delegations](docs/schema/delegations.md): Time-bucketed delegation history. Each row represents one continuous
### Sentinels, stakes, plasma

- [sentinels](docs/schema/sentinels.md): Active sentinel node registrations. Refreshed from `SentinelApi.GetAllActive`
- [stakes](docs/schema/stakes.md): One row per `Stake.Stake` event. Tracks the staked amount, duration, expiry,
- [fusions](docs/schema/fusions.md): Plasma fusion entries — QSR fused (locked) to grant plasma to a beneficiary
### Accelerator-Z

- [projects](docs/schema/projects.md): Accelerator-Z funding proposals. Refreshed from
- [project_phases](docs/schema/project_phases.md): Accelerator-Z sub-grants. A project's funding can be broken into multiple
- [votes](docs/schema/votes.md): Pillar votes on Accelerator-Z projects and phases. One row per
### Rewards

- [cumulative_rewards](docs/schema/cumulative_rewards.md): Running per-(address, reward type, token) total of reward amounts received.
- [reward_transactions](docs/schema/reward_transactions.md): One row per reward-receive block: the actual on-chain event that credited
### Bridge

- [wrap_token_requests](docs/schema/wrap_token_requests.md): A user's intent to wrap a Zenon ZTS token onto an external chain (Ethereum,
- [unwrap_token_requests](docs/schema/unwrap_token_requests.md): An external-chain → Zenon unwrap intent (a user redeeming a wrapped token
- [bridge_networks](docs/schema/bridge_networks.md): Cached configuration of each destination network the Zenon bridge is
- [bridge_network_tokens](docs/schema/bridge_network_tokens.md): Per-(network, token) bridge configuration: external-chain token contract,
- [bridge_admin](docs/schema/bridge_admin.md): Singleton table — exactly one row keyed `row_id = 1` — holding the bridge
- [bridge_guardians](docs/schema/bridge_guardians.md): Active bridge guardians — the set of addresses that can vote on bridge
- [bridge_orchestrator_info](docs/schema/bridge_orchestrator_info.md): Singleton table holding the bridge orchestrator's operating parameters
- [bridge_security_info](docs/schema/bridge_security_info.md): Singleton with the bridge security delay parameters from
### Daily snapshots

- [network_stat_histories](docs/schema/network_stat_histories.md): Daily network-wide snapshot — one row per UTC date. Aggregates total /
- [token_stat_histories](docs/schema/token_stat_histories.md): Daily per-token snapshot. For each (date, token) the row records that day's
- [pillar_stat_histories](docs/schema/pillar_stat_histories.md): Daily per-pillar snapshot. Captures rank, weight, and active-delegator count
- [bridge_stat_histories](docs/schema/bridge_stat_histories.md): Daily per-(network, chain, token) bridge volume snapshot. Aggregates wrap
## Indexing

- [Overview](docs/indexing/index.md): How a momentum becomes rows. Starting at the wire and ending at committed
- [Pillar contract](docs/indexing/pillar-contract.md): `z1qxemdeddedxpyllarxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxsy3fmg` — defined as
- [Sentinel contract](docs/indexing/sentinel-contract.md): `z1qxemdeddedxsentynelxxxxxxxxxxxxxwy0r2r` — `SentinelAddress`.
- [Stake contract](docs/indexing/stake-contract.md): `z1qxemdeddedxstakexxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxjv8v62` — `StakeAddress`.
- [Plasma contract](docs/indexing/plasma-contract.md): `z1qxemdeddedxplasmaxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxsctrp` — `PlasmaAddress`.
- [Accelerator-Z contract](docs/indexing/accelerator-contract.md): `z1qxemdeddedxaccelerat0rxxxxxxxxxxp4tk22` — `AcceleratorAddress`.
- [Token contract](docs/indexing/token-contract.md): `z1qxemdeddedxt0kenxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxh9amk0` — `TokenAddress`.
- [Liquidity contract](docs/indexing/liquidity-contract.md): `z1qxemdeddedxlyquydytyxxxxxxxxxxxxflaaae` — `LiquidityAddress`.
- [Bridge contract](docs/indexing/bridge-contract.md): `z1qxemdeddedxdrydgexxxxxxxxxxxxxxxmqgr0d` — `BridgeAddress`.
- [Rewards](docs/indexing/rewards.md): Reward indexing is the most subtle piece of the per-block pipeline. It
- [ABI decoding](docs/indexing/abi-decoding.md): How raw account-block call data becomes `(method, inputs)` for the

- [Deploy](docs/operations/deploy.md): The canonical deployment is Docker Compose. The core stack is the

- [Monitoring](docs/operations/monitoring.md): What "healthy" looks like and how to spot trouble.
- [Sync watchdog](docs/operations/watchdog.md): The watchdog detects two failure modes and reacts in-process so the
- [Backfill](docs/operations/backfill.md): Three paths exist for filling gaps in the indexer's tables. Pick by use case.
- [Backup and restore](docs/operations/backup-restore.md): Two shell scripts ship with the repo:
- [Failure modes](docs/operations/failure-modes.md): Known ways the indexer can stall or misbehave, with detection and
- [Scaling](docs/operations/scaling.md): This indexer is a single-process service writing to one Postgres
- [Runbook](docs/operations/runbook.md): Numbered playbooks for the most common incidents. Each is a tight

- [Authoring docs](docs/development/docs.md): The doc site is mkdocs-material with plain Markdown source. Anyone
## Testing

- [Strategy](docs/testing/strategy.md): Two tiers: fast unit tests run by default; integration tests gated by
- [Integration database](docs/testing/integration-db.md): How to provision a Postgres for the `-tags integration` tests.
- [Writing tests](docs/testing/writing-tests.md): Patterns to follow when adding tests to the codebase.

- [Node selection](docs/config/node-selection.md): The indexer requires a WebSocket-enabled Zenon node. The default

- [History](docs/migrations/history.md): Narrative of every migration with the problem it solved.

## API

- [Overview](docs/api/index.md): The nom-indexer-go HTTP API is a read-only layer over the indexed
- [Authentication](docs/api/auth.md): All endpoints under `/api/v1/` require a Bearer JWT. `/healthz`,
- [Pagination](docs/api/pagination.md): Collection endpoints use **offset/limit** pagination with a fixed
### Endpoints

- [Overview](docs/api/endpoints/index.md): Read the full machine-readable contract in
- [Meta](docs/api/endpoints/meta.md): Liveness, readiness, and indexer sync state.
- [Momentums](docs/api/endpoints/momentums.md): A momentum is a block header in Zenon's dual-ledger model. See the
- [Accounts](docs/api/endpoints/accounts.md): `address` is the account's Zenon address (`z1q…`).
- [Account blocks](docs/api/endpoints/account_blocks.md): Account-blocks are Zenon's dual-ledger transactions: one block is
- [Tokens](docs/api/endpoints/tokens.md): ZTS tokens registered on the Zenon Network.
- [Pillars](docs/api/endpoints/pillars.md): Pillars are Zenon's validator nodes.
- [Sentinels](docs/api/endpoints/sentinels.md): Sentinels are Zenon's secondary network nodes (lighter-stake than
- [Stakes & Fusions](docs/api/endpoints/stakes_fusions.md): Both default to `is_active = true`; pass `?include_inactive=true`
- [Projects & Votes](docs/api/endpoints/projects.md): Accelerator-Z projects, phases, and pillar votes.
- [Rewards](docs/api/endpoints/rewards.md): Per-account reward surfaces.
- [Bridge](docs/api/endpoints/bridge.md): Cross-chain wrap/unwrap requests handled by the Zenon bridge.
## MCP

- [Overview](docs/mcp/index.md): The nom-indexer-go MCP server is a [Model Context
- [Tools](docs/mcp/tools.md): Every tool the [MCP server](index.md) exposes, grouped by domain. Names
- [Resources](docs/mcp/resources.md): **v1 advertises no MCP resources.** All data the server offers is
- [Setup — Claude Desktop](docs/mcp/setup-claude-desktop.md): Configure Claude Desktop to query the hosted nom-indexer MCP server.
- [Setup — Claude Code](docs/mcp/setup-claude-code.md): Configure [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code) to query the
## Reference
